message:
fix(transport): prevent u32 overflow in reorderer, use integer arithmetic in load balancer

SymbolReorderer: Replace all next_expected += 1 and seq + 1 operations
with saturating_add(1) to prevent u32 overflow when sequence numbers
approach u32::MAX. Handle cutoff == u32::MAX in flush_timeouts as a
special case (take all buffer entries) since split_off(u32::MAX + 1)
would overflow.

LoadBalancer: Switch weighted-least-connections comparison from f64
division (weight/connections) to u128 cross-multiplication to eliminate
floating-point imprecision in endpoint selection. Extract LCG constants
into named consts. Add allocation-free select_random_single_without_
materializing() fast path for the common select_n(_, 1, _) case with
Random strategy.

Properly separate LeastConnections and WeightedLeastConnections sorting
in select_n to apply correct comparison logic for each strategy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
